title: Jeroen Webb

'''Jeroen Webb''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Ralltiiri|native]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] who became a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the local [[Ralltiir underground]] following the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugation]] of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Webb helped his close friend [[Pharl McQuarrie/Legends|Pharl McQuarrie]] stage a diversionary raid on Ralltiir that allowed information concerning the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] to reach [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], culminating in the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] eventual destruction at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, Webb once more worked alongside McQuarrie at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], the Rebellion's [[Alliance High Command/Legends|High Command]] headquarters on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Biography==
===Ralltiiri Rebel===
Jeroen Webb [[Ralltiiri|hailed]] from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. Following<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugation]] of<ref name="Empire 5">[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]]</ref> his<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Empire 5" /> Webb joined the local [[Ralltiir underground]] as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] in resistance of the Imperial occupation.<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> After Webb's close friend [[Pharl McQuarrie/Legends|Pharl McQuarrie]] fled Ralltiir to seek help from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Webb's Rebel cell coincidentally soon came into possession of information concerning the Empire's new secret [[Superweapon/Legends|weapon]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]].<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|74|Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth}}</ref>

Webb worked to help McQuarrie sneak back onto Ralltiir, past the Imperial [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], to take command of the local resistance and stage a diversionary raid that allowed the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] information to reach [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the Rebel Alliance. Thanks in part to Webb's efforts, the Rebellion went on to [[Battle of Toprawa|capture]] the battlestation's full [[Death Star plans/Legends|technical schematics]] as part of [[Operation Skyhook]],<ref name="Who's Who" /> leading to the Death Star's eventual destruction at the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]].<ref name="Atas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

===Service at Echo Base===
[[File:ReligiousDiscussion-ESBBR.png|thumb|left|260px|Jeroen Webb (center) looks on as Han Solo departs Echo Base to search for the missing Luke Skywalker.]]
Webb later served at<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] headquarters of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. His new post once more had him working alongside Pharl McQuarrie, who was second-in-command to base [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]].<ref name="Who's Who" /> At Echo Base, Webb became one of the Rebels' [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntaun]] handlers.<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which includes Jeroen Webb's service at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> just prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Webb was present in Echo Base's tauntaun stable, conversing with another [[Alliance Military/Legends|officer]], the [[Standard day/Legends|night]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] went missing during a routine [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] mission of the external Hoth perimeter. Webb watched as [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] disregarded the warnings of<ref name="ESB" /> [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tigran Jamiro/Legends|Tigran Jamiro]]<ref name="Who's Who" /> to take his own tauntaun out into the dangerously [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] Hoth night in search of Skywalker.<ref name="ESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Jeroen Webb was a skilled [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] when he joined the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="CSWE" /> He was also a close friend of fellow Ralltiir native Pharl McQuarrie, one of their homeworld's respected military [[Advisor/Legends|advisors]] prior to the Imperial occupation of the planet.<ref name="Who's Who" /> A [[Human/Legends|Human]], Webb had [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and light skin.<ref name="ESB" />

==Skills and abilities==
Webb had above-average intelligence and speed, slightly above average strength and fighting ability, and average diplomacy. He was not [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].<ref name="Galactic Files">{{Topps|set=2013 Topps Star Wars Galactic Files Series 2|cardname=Jeroen Webb (Rebel Commander)|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/93283/cid/6569529/2013-Topps-Star-Wars-Galactic-Files-Series-2-503-Jeroen-Webb}}</ref>

==Equipment==
During the night Han Solo departed Echo Base to search for the missing Luke Skywalker, Webb donned the field-[[Rebel trooper/Legends|soldier]] variant of the Rebels' standard [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|cold-weather armor]], including [[Alliance Cold Weather Headgear|headgear]], [[Anti-glare goggles/Legends|anti-glare goggles]], [[Scarf/Legends|scarf]], [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|padded vest]], [[thermal flak jacket]], [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|gloves]], [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|belt]], [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|leggings]], and [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|boots]].<ref name="ESB" /> His equipment also included [[Binoculars/Legends|binoculars]].<ref name="Binoculars">''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' identifies the [[:File:Binoculars.jpg|device]] on the right side of Jeroen Webb's [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|vest]], as seen in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], as [[Binoculars/Legends|binoculars]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:FordDuffRehearsal-MTESB.png|thumb|right|260px|[[Harrison Ford]] (Han Solo) rehearses a scene from ''The Empire Strikes Back'' with Jeroen Webb actor Norwich Duff.]]
Jeroen Webb appeared in the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. He stands in during the scene in which Han Solo departs Echo Base on a tauntaun to search for the missing Luke Skywalker.<ref name="ESB" /> [[Wikipedia:British people|British]] actor [[Norwich Duff]] portrayed Webb in the film,<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back - 135">''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> credited only as one of several "Other Officers" in the Rebel Forces.<ref name="ESB" /> The character was first named and given a brief backstory on the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Hoth-Light/large/jeroenwebb.gif "Jeroen Webb" card] as part of the [[November]] [[1996]] ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Hoth Limited" />

An image of Jeroen Webb appears on the packaging for the [https://www.rebelscum.com/VINtRebelcomm.asp "Rebel Commander"] action figure, released in 1980 as part of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] original [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (toy line)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' toy line]]. However, the actual action figure, complete with a mustache,<ref name="Kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (toy line)|pack=Rebel Commander|link=VINtRebelcomm.asp}}</ref> is based on Hoth Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]], according to author [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''.<ref name="Action Figure Archive">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref>

Some in the online ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan community have linked the Jeroen Webb character to [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] actor [[Treat Williams]],<ref name="Star Wars Universe">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwars-universe.com/casting-327-treat-richard-williams.html|text=STAR WARS UNIVERSE.COM - Films - Cast & Prod - Casting des acteurs de Star Wars - WILLIAMS Treat Richard|work=[http://www.starwars-universe.com Star Wars Universe]|language=French|quote=Actor / voice actor (Films): The Empire strikes back: Jess Allashane / Jerrol Blendin / Jeroen Webb|archivedate=20170922190111}}</ref><ref name="Planet Dagobah">{{WebCite|url=http://planetdagobah.com/autographclassitrilogy.htm|text=Autograph Classic Trilogy|date=2012-07-25|work=[http://planetdagobah.com JMY'S PLANET DAGOBAH]|quote=Treat Williams: Jess Allashane (Echo Base Trooper) (ESB); Jeroen Webb (ESB); Jerrol Blendin (Cloud City Trooper) (ESB)|archivedate=20171115021856}}</ref><ref name="I Have a Bad Feeling About This">{{WebCite|url=http://www.geocities.ws/karloff3/Autograph/treat_williams.htm|text=Star Wars Autograph Successes - Treat Williams|author="karloff3"|work=[http://www.geocities.ws/karloff3 I Have a Bad Feeling About This]|quote=Treat Williams Jeroen Webb; Treat Williams Jerrol Blendin|archivedate=20170922190932}}</ref> who visited the [[Elstree Studios]] set in [[Wikipedia:England|England]] during the [[1979]] filming of ''The Empire Strikes Back''<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back - 135" /> and reportedly appears in the film as a Rebel officer extra during the Echo Base scenes.<ref name="John Morton TFN interview">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/jedicouncil/interview/dak.asp|text=TheForce.Net - Jedi Council - Interviews - Cellblock 1138 - John Morton|author=Scott Chitwood & Darin Smith|format=Transcript of 14/02/1997 phone interview|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20190730113959}}</ref> However, the [[2010]] behind-the-scenes book ''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' confirms that actor Norwich Duff portrayed Webb.<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back - 135" />
